ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot politely indicating the location of restrooms.  The robot will use a gesture that is both informative and respectful.  The sequence will start with both arms at the sides, then extend one arm outward in a directional gesture, then return to a neutral position. The gesture will be subtle and not overly animated to maintain politeness.

frames.beat: both arms hang relaxed at the sides
the right arm points the way, politely indicating
both arms return to a neutral resting position
